sentences.arabic: الْإِسْلَامُ دِينُ الْأَخْلَاقِ الْحَسَنَةِ وَالْمُعَامَلَةِ الطَّيِّبَةِ مَعَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Islam je vjera lijepog morala i dobrog ophuđenja prema ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: Islam is a religion of good character and kind treatment of people.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ: «مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ فَلْيُحْسِنْ إِلَى جَارِهِ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْإِيمَانِ، رَقْمُ ٧٧].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Ko vjeruje u Allaha i Sudnji dan, neka čini dobro svome komšiji' [Muslim, Knjiga o imanu, br. 77].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him be good to his neighbor' [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Faith, No. 77].

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ الْحَقُّ هُوَ الَّذِي يُسَاعِدُ جَارَهُ وَلَا يُؤْذِيهِ أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Pravi musliman je onaj koji pomaže svom komšiji i nikada mu ne nanosi štetu.
sentences.translationEn: A true Muslim is one who helps his neighbor and never harms him.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْخُلُقُ يَنْشُرُ الْمَحَبَّةَ وَالسَّلَامَ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Ovakav ahlak širi ljubav i mir u društvu.
sentences.translationEn: This character spreads love and peace in society.

sentences.arabic: نَتَعَلَّمُ مِنْ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ أَنَّ الْإِيمَانَ لَيْسَ صَلَاةً فَقَطْ، بَلْ هُوَ أَدَبٌ أَيْضًا.
sentences.translation: Iz ovog hadisa učimo da iman nije samo namaz, već i lijepo ponašanje.
sentences.translationEn: We learn from this hadith that faith is not only prayer, but also good manners.
